title: jacquemontia linoides var. major
intro: Jacquemontia linoides var. major, also known as the Large Five-angled Jacquemontia or Climbing Mornay, is a perennial climbing vine native to tropical Africa. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional African medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and wounds. The health benefits of Jacquemontia linoides var. major include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce swelling and prevent infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and ointments, which are used to treat a range of health issues.
